intro: Virga stricta, also known as Devil's Claw, is a perennial plant native to southern Africa, characterized by its unique claw-like roots and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Virga stricta include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as potential treatment for digestive issues and arthritis. The bioactive constituents of this plant include harpagoside, a unique iridoid glycoside responsible for its medicinal properties, as well as other compounds like harpagide and procantenoides. In traditional herbal medicine, Virga stricta is commonly prepared as a capsule, tablet, or tincture, and is also used as an extract in creams and ointments to aid in the treatment of musculoskeletal conditions.
